title: Perfectly Optimized
description: A Fabric modpack with peak performance and smooth gameplay.
body:
# Perfectly Optimized

**Perfectly Optimized** is the ultimate Minecraft modpack for players seeking peak performance and a buttery-smooth gameplay experience. **Designed for all systems, from high-end rigs to modest machines,** this Fabric-based pack focuses solely on enhancing FPS, reducing lag, and improving overall game stability. 

**Experience Minecraft as it should be:** With a carefully curated selection of top-tier optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and C2ME, Perfectly Optimized ensures your game runs at its absolute best. **Even lower-end systems, enjoy faster loading times, reduced stuttering, and a significant increase in FPS.** All without compromising the core vanilla gameplay mechanics. 

**Built for Customization:** This lightweight pack provides a clean foundation for your own creative endeavors. Add your own mods on top of this solid performance foundation and create your own unique Minecraft experience without the burden of performance issues.

#### Key Features:

* **Unmatched Performance:** Experience Minecraft with significantly improved FPS, reduced lag, and faster loading times.
* **Vanilla-Friendly:** Enjoy the core Minecraft experience with a smoother, more responsive gameplay while maintaining vanilla game mechanics.
* **Lightweight and Efficient:** Optimized for minimal resource usage, ensuring smooth performance even on lower-end systems.
* **Regular Updates:** Stay ahead of the curve with regular updates that include the latest performance improvements and Minecraft version compatibility.
* **Highly Customizable:** Easily add your favorite mods and create a personalized Minecraft experience.

<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

**Explore the full list of mods for the latest version below!**

- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**: Fastest rendering engine with massive FPS boosts.
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**: Optimizes various game mechanics like physics, mob AI, and block ticking for a significant performance gain without altering the vanilla experience.
- **[C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)**: Speeds up chunk loading by using multiple CPU cores.
- **[Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current)**: Reduces redstone dust lag.
- **[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)**: Improves performance by addressing various minor inefficiencies in vanilla Minecraft. 
- **[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)**: Mod configuration interface.
- **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**: Enables OptiFine-style connected textures.
- **[Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)**: Play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window.
- **[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)**: Reduces resource usage when Minecraft is inactive or in the background.
- **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)**: Improves performance by not rendering blocks and entities not visible to the player.
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**: Essential library for many Fabric mods.
- **[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)**: Enables Kotlin language support for mod development.
- **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)**: Reduces memory usage and improves performance.
- **[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)**: Allows developers to use Forge and NeoForge config systems on different mod loaders.
- **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)**: Optimizes Minecraft's immediate mode rendering for increased FPS.
- **[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)**: Modern shader loader for Minecraft compatible with OptiFine shader packs.
- **[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)**: Optimizes networking for improved performance and reduced server load.
- **[Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)**: Speeds up language switching.
- **[MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)**: Provides common utilities and a lightweight configuration system for mods.
- **[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)**: Improves performance, memory usage and fixes bugs in modern Minecraft.
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**: Adds a mod menu to view all the installed mods.
- **[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)**: Improves performance by optimizing entity and block culling further.
- **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)**: Prevents chat messages from being reported by removing players cryptographic signatures.
- **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)**: Speeds up world generation.
- **[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)**: Alternate and more intuitive options menu. 
- **[Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)**: Allows resource packs to load in the background, reducing loading times.
- **[ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)**: Improves lighting performance and reduces lag.
- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)**: Adds additional features and optimizations to Sodium.
- **[Yet Another Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)**: Another big configuration library for mods.
- **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)**: A zoom mod with unlimited customizability.

</details>

**Download Perfectly Optimized today and experience Minecraft _like never before_!**
